segments.caption: The video concludes on the outdoor basketball court under a bright blue sky, with the '2HYPE' branding visible on the blue-painted court surface. The Player in white '2HYPE' jersey with red trim, wearing gray sweatpants and red sneakers, stands center court, gesturing animatedly with his arms raised, pointing, and speaking to the camera, clearly celebrating a victory. Beside him, the Player in white hoodie (bleached blonde hair, beard, blue patterned shorts) and the Player in white t-shirt with 'LOO-THEUS' print (curly brown hair, blue patterned shorts) stand holding basketballs, smiling and laughing. In the background, the Player in black '2HYPE' t-shirt with pink shorts (blonde hair, beard) runs past, reacting with mock frustration after being blocked. The Player in blue '2HYPE' jersey (curly brown hair) is also seen running away, smiling. The Player in black '2HYPE' hoodie and gray sweatpants with white cap (beard, dark skin) walks away from the hoop area. The scene is lively and celebratory, with the central player clearly the focus of the moment. The video then cuts to a static end screen with a white and blue geometric design, featuring the '2HYPE' and '100 THIEVES' logos, and the text 'Thank you for watching' with an arrow pointing to 'DON'T FORGET TO SUBSCRIBE!' in bold black letters.
